title: dioscorea buckleyana
intro: Dioscorea buckleyana, also known as Buckland's yam, is a type of plant that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. It is a climbing perennial vine native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea buckleyana include supporting immune function, reducing inflammation, and potentially lowering blood pressure, with herbal preparations often taking the form of dried roots or extracts used in traditional medicine.
